customerMessage: Hi, I submitted a distribution request last week. Can you tell me the status?

retrievedDocs.name: Distribution Processing Policy
retrievedDocs.excerpt: Distribution requests take 5-10 business days to process. Current status is visible in the participant portal at myaccount.ascensus.com.

suggestedResponse: Hi Maria, your distribution request is currently processing. Standard timeline is 5-10 business days. You can check real-time status by logging into your participant portal at myaccount.ascensus.com. Is there anything else I can help with?
nextAction: Confirm participant has portal access. If not, guide to myaccount.ascensus.com.
whyExplanationFallback: The system matched this inquiry to the Distribution Processing Policy with high confidence (94%). The retrieved document confirmed the 5-10 business day SLA and directed participants to the online portal for status updates. No ambiguous signals were detected, and no tool failures occurred — this is a clean, high-confidence response.
